summary: Iteration 4 testing — 5 improvement blocks: Security, UX, Clickmassa integration, Webhook, Code Quality. All 8 backend tests PASS. Frontend UX features confirmed via Playwright + screenshots.

issues: Note: inner_text() call in test returned empty due to Escape key race condition in test script — screenshot confirms all 3 Clickmassa fields (URL DO SERVIDOR, TOKEN DE AUTENTICAÇÃO, ID DO CANAL) ARE present and visible

critical_code_review_comments: auth.py: _IS_PRODUCTION uses ENVIRONMENT var but no .env entry documents this — consider adding ENVIRONMENT=production to prod .env

integrations.py: isMock in frontend Integrations.jsx uses heuristic (checks credentials fields) before test is run — could show wrong DEMO badge initially if server_url/api_token not in integration response (credentials are stripped in fmt()). Currently works because mockFlags state is set after test call.
NodePanel.jsx: 'Trigger' subtype label still shows as 'trigger' in panel subtitle (line 314: node.type.replace(/_/g, ' ') → shows 'trigger' not 'Gatilho'). Minor cosmetic issue.
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up TEST_Demo Integration via API
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 improvement blocks implemented and verified. Auth uses httpOnly cookies (no localStorage). Webhook endpoint working. Clickmassa mock/demo mode working with is_mock flag. NODE_PALETTE has Portuguese labels. AlertDialog for node deletion. NodePanel has Select components for method/action/output_type. DEMO badge on integrations. Backend 100% passing.
